query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_DEFAULT FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'users' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('onboardingStage', 'onboardingComplete', 'onboarding_stage', 'onboarding_complete');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3ve2VbkP4iEu522.root --database jQsGzEaS9E2xgaK8jEKUPB --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_DEFAULT FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'users' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('onboardingStage', 'onboardingComplete', 'onboarding_stage', 'onboarding_complete');
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	COLUMN_TYPE	IS_NULLABLE	COLUMN_DEFAULT
onboardingComplete	tinyint(1)	NO	0
onboardingStage	int	NO	1
